caption: The video features a promotional graphic for "The Opening Call" featuring Basil Chapman. The layout is split, with the left side showing a high-angle shot of a workspace containing a laptop, a white keyboard, and a green mug on a light-colored desk. The right side has a white background with the logo "TFNN.COM" and the tagline "EDUCATING INVESTORS." Across the center, a dark banner displays "THE OPENING CALL," while a bottom blue banner reads "Basil Chapman" and "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022." As the sequence progresses, red and blue text appears on the right side. Initially, it asks "NOT SATISFIED?" and "GET A," but it quickly transitions to a full message stating, "NOT SATISFIED? GET A FULL REFUND WITHIN 30 DAYS." The scene remains static except for the appearing and disappearing text on the right.
